case_title: LYRIC GRIGSBY VS. DONTE ANTHONY CULLINS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED OCT-22-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINS, DONTE ANTHONY
